result.stderr:
Carp 1.0.5+a106930fcb2e7c9250b724a9a7143fdffdc57a34
Copyright (C) 2026 Melodi17

  -i, --interactive        Start the Carp REPL after executing the script.

  -c, --line               Execute the Carp code provided in the command line.

  -v, --verbose            (Default: true) Print the result of the script
                           execution to the console.

  -d, --debug              Start the Carp debugger.

  -f, --force-throw        Force the internal errors to trigger the native
                           stacktrace.

  --strict-warnings        Treat warnings as errors

  --default-non-structs    (Default: true) Allow non-struct objects to be
                           auto-initialized

  --implicit-casts         (Default: true) Enable implicit casting/type coercion

  --help                   Display this help screen.

  --version                Display version information.

  Path (pos. 0)            The path to the script, project or package to run.
